quotes.text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
It's not whether you get knocked down; it's whether you get up.
Champions keep playing until they get it right.
I've failed over and over and over again in my life — and that is why I succeed.
Today, I will do what others won't, so tomorrow I can do what others can't.
Don't let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
It's hard to beat a person who never gives up.
You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
Pressure is a privilege.
There is no substitute for guts.
Practice like you've never won. Perform like you've never lost.
Set your goals high, and don't stop till you get there.
The only place where success comes before work is in the dictionary.
Trust your training.
Once you learn to quit, it becomes a habit.
The fight is won or lost far away from witnesses — behind the lines, in the gym, and out there on the road.
I am building a fire, and every day I train, I add more fuel.
The more difficult the victory, the greater the happiness in winning.
Champions are made when no one is watching.
What you lack in talent can be made up with desire, hustle, and giving 110 percent all the time.
Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
The harder the battle, the sweeter the victory.
